entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for the development of high-yielding and rust-resistant cultivars

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: A desirable characteristic of groundnut cultivars essential for sustainable production

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to resist rust disease, necessary for sustainable production

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: A traditional breeding approach used to develop rust-resistant cultivars

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Modern tools used to identify candidate genes for rust resistance

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Specific genes that provide resistance to rust in groundnut

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used to aid the introgression of resistance genes into adapted elite germplasm

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that integrates conventional breeding with molecular markers to enhance rust resistance

entities.name: RUST PATHOGEN
entities.description: The biological organism responsible for causing rust disease in groundnut

entities.name: HOST-PATHOGEN INTERACTION
entities.description: The biological interaction between the groundnut plant and the rust pathogen
